mapper.select: WITH cte_market_data_stream AS ( SELECT tick_id, asset_id, asset_symbol, asset_class, tick_timestamp, bid_price, ask_price, (bid_price + ask_price) / 2.0 AS mid_price, volume_24h, LAG(bid_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id ORDER BY tick_timestamp) AS prev_bid_price, LAG(ask_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id ORDER BY tick_timestamp) AS prev_ask_price, LEAD(bid_price, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id ORDER BY tick_timestamp) AS next_bid_price, FIRST_VALUE(bid_price) OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', tick_timestamp) ORDER BY tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS day_open_bid, LAST_VALUE(ask_price) OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', tick_timestamp) ORDER BY tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS day_close_ask, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('hour', tick_timestamp) ORDER BY tick_timestamp DESC) AS hourly_ranking FROM market_ticks WHERE tick_timestamp >= #{systemStartTime} AND tick_timestamp <= #{systemEndTime} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ), cte_moving_averages_and_signals AS ( SELECT stream.tick_id, stream.asset_id, stream.asset_symbol, stream.tick_timestamp, stream.mid_price, AVG(stream.mid_price) OVER (PARTITION BY stream.asset_id ORDER BY stream.tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 9 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_10_period, AVG(stream.mid_price) OVER (PARTITION BY stream.asset_id ORDER BY stream.tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_30_period, AVG(stream.mid_price) OVER (PARTITION BY stream.asset_id ORDER BY stream.tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 99 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_100_period, STDDEV(stream.mid_price) OVER (PARTITION BY stream.asset_id ORDER BY stream.tick_timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_volatility_30, CASE WHEN stream.mid_price > stream.day_open_bid * 1.05 THEN 'BULLISH_SURGE' WHEN stream.mid_price < stream.day_open_bid * 0.95 THEN 'BEARISH_DROP' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS intra_day_trend, CASE WHEN stream.prev_bid_price IS NOT NULL AND stream.bid_price > stream.prev_bid_price THEN 1 WHEN stream.prev_bid_price IS NOT NULL AND stream.bid_price < stream.prev_bid_price THEN -1 ELSE 0 END AS price_momentum_direction FROM cte_market_data_stream stream WHERE stream.hourly_ranking = 1 ), cte_account_profiles_and_tiers AS ( SELECT acc.account_id, acc.user_id, acc.account_type, acc.risk_profile_rating, acc.base_currency, usr.country_code, usr.kyc_status, usr.vip_level, CASE WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_5' THEN 0.0005 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_4' THEN 0.0010 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_3' THEN 0.0015 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_2' THEN 0.0020 ELSE 0.0030 END AS maker_fee_rate, CASE WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_5' THEN 0.0008 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_4' THEN 0.0014 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_3' THEN 0.0022 WHEN usr.vip_level = 'TIER_2' THEN 0.0028 ELSE 0.0040 END AS taker_fee_rate, SUM(acc.initial_margin_requirement) OVER (PARTITION BY acc.user_id) AS user_total_imr FROM user_accounts acc INNER JOIN user_master usr ON acc.user_id = usr.id WHERE acc.is_active = 1 AND usr.is_suspended = 0 ), cte_order_execution_ledger AS ( SELECT ord.order_id, ord.account_id, ord.asset_id, ord.execution_side, ord.order_type, ord.filled_quantity, ord.execution_price, ord.execution_timestamp, ord.liquidity_indicator, ord.filled_quantity * ord.execution_price AS total_gross_volume, SUM(ord.filled_quantity * ord.execution_price) OVER (PARTITION BY ord.account_id) AS account_cumulative_volume, SUM(ord.filled_quantity * ord.execution_price) OVER (PARTITION BY ord.account_id, ord.asset_id) AS account_asset_volume, COUNT(ord.order_id) OVER (PARTITION BY ord.account_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', ord.execution_timestamp)) AS daily_trade_count, MAX(ord.execution_price) OVER (PARTITION BY ord.asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', ord.execution_timestamp)) AS daily_asset_max_execution, MIN(ord.execution_price) OVER (PARTITION BY ord.asset_id, DATE_TRUNC('day', ord.execution_timestamp)) AS daily_asset_min_execution FROM trade_orders ord WHERE ord.order_status = 'FILLED' AND ord.execution_timestamp >= #{systemStartTime} AND ord.execution_timestamp <= #{systemEndTime} ), cte_fee_deduction_matrix AS ( SELECT ledger.order_id, ledger.account_id, ledger.asset_id, ledger.execution_side, ledger.total_gross_volume, profile.vip_level, profile.base_currency, CASE WHEN ledger.liquidity_indicator = 'MAKER' THEN ledger.total_gross_volume * profile.maker_fee_rate ELSE ledger.total_gross_volume * profile.taker_fee_rate END AS calculated_commission, CASE WHEN profile.country_code IN ('US', 'GB', 'CA') THEN ledger.total_gross_volume * 0.0002 ELSE ledger.total_gross_volume * 0.0001 END AS regulatory_clearing_fee, CASE WHEN ledger.total_gross_volume > 1000000 FOR UPDATE THEN ledger.total_gross_volume * 0.00005 ELSE 0.0 END AS dynamic_slippage_buffer FROM cte_order_execution_ledger ledger INNER JOIN cte_account_profiles_and_tiers profile ON ledger.account_id = profile.account_id ), cte_margin_utilization_snapshot AS ( SELECT bal.balance_id, bal.account_id, bal.wallet_type, bal.currency_code, bal.deposited_collateral, bal.borrowed_amount, bal.locked_escrow, (bal.deposited_collateral - bal.borrowed_amount) AS net_equity_raw, CASE WHEN bal.currency_code = 'USDT' THEN 1.0 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'USDC' THEN 1.0 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'BTC' THEN 0.90 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'ETH' THEN 0.85 ELSE 0.50 END AS risk_haircut_coefficient, (bal.deposited_collateral * CASE WHEN bal.currency_code = 'USDT' THEN 1.0 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'USDC' THEN 1.0 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'BTC' THEN 0.90 WHEN bal.currency_code = 'ETH' THEN 0.85 ELSE 0.50 END) AS risk_adjusted_collateral, AVG(bal.deposited_collateral) OVER (PARTITION BY bal.currency_code) AS system_global_currency_avg FROM account_balances bal WHERE bal.sync_status = 'SYNCHRONIZED' ), cte_realized_pnl_ledger AS ( SELECT exe.account_id, exe.asset_id, SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'BUY' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_bought_units, SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'SELL' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_sold_units, SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'BUY' THEN exe.total_gross_volume ELSE 0 END) AS total_buy_cost, SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'SELL' THEN exe.total_gross_volume ELSE 0 END) AS total_sell_revenue, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'BUY' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'BUY' THEN exe.total_gross_volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'BUY' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END AS weighted_average_buy_price, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'SELL' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'SELL' THEN exe.total_gross_volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN exe.execution_side = 'SELL' THEN exe.filled_quantity ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END AS weighted_average_sell_price FROM cte_order_execution_ledger exe GROUP BY exe.account_id, exe.asset_id ), cte_unrealized_pnl_valuation AS ( SELECT pnl.account_id, pnl.asset_id, pnl.total_bought_units, pnl.total_sold_units, pnl.total_buy_cost, pnl.total_sell_revenue, (pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) AS current_open_position, sig.mid_price AS current_market_mid_price, ((pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) * sig.mid_price) AS market_value_of_open_position, CASE WHEN (pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) > 0 THEN ((pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) * sig.mid_price) - (pnl.total_buy_cost - (pnl.total_sold_units * pnl.weighted_average_buy_price)) WHEN (pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) < 0 THEN (pnl.total_sell_revenue - (pnl.total_bought_units * pnl.weighted_average_sell_price)) - ABS((pnl.total_bought_units - pnl.total_sold_units) * sig.mid_price) ELSE 0.0 END AS floating_unrealized_pnl, (pnl.total_sell_revenue - (pnl.total_sold_units * pnl.weighted_average_buy_price)) AS final_realized_pnl_subtotal FROM cte_realized_pnl_ledger pnl INNER JOIN cte_moving_averages_and_signals sig ON pnl.asset_id = sig.asset_id ), cte_rolling_drawdown_metrics AS ( SELECT unr.account_id, unr.asset_id, unr.floating_unrealized_pnl, unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal, (unr.floating_unrealized_pnl + unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal) AS combined_net_pnl, MAX(unr.floating_unrealized_pnl + unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal) OVER (PARTITION BY unr.account_id ORDER BY unr.asset_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS historical_peak_combined_pnl, CASE WHEN MAX(unr.floating_unrealized_pnl + unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal) OVER (PARTITION BY unr.account_id ORDER BY unr.asset_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) > 0 THEN (unr.floating_unrealized_pnl + unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal) - MAX(unr.floating_unrealized_pnl + unr.final_realized_pnl_subtotal) OVER (PARTITION BY unr.account_id ORDER BY unr.asset_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) ELSE 0.0 END AS absolute_pnl_drawdown FROM cte_unrealized_pnl_valuation unr ), cte_compliance_and_audit_log AS ( SELECT fee.account_id, SUM(fee.calculated_commission) AS aggregated_fees_paid, SUM(fee.regulatory_clearing_fee) AS aggregated_regulatory_fees, COUNT(fee.order_id) AS gross_transaction_count, CASE WHEN COUNT(fee.order_id) > 500 THEN 'HIGH_FREQUENCY_TRADER' WHEN COUNT(fee.order_id) > 100 THEN 'ACTIVE_ALGORITHMIC_TRADER' WHEN COUNT(fee.order_id) > 10 THEN 'RETAIL_DISCRETIONARY' ELSE 'INACTIVE_OR_PASSIVE' END AS account_activity_classification, CASE WHEN SUM(fee.dynamic_slippage_buffer) > #{criticalSlippageThreshold} THEN 'CRITICAL_SLIPPAGE_WARNING' ELSE 'NOMINAL_EXECUTION_QUALITY' END AS execution_health_metric FROM cte_fee_deduction_matrix fee GROUP BY fee.account_id ), cte_consolidated_summary_matrix AS ( SELECT prof.account_id, prof.user_id, prof.account_type, prof.risk_profile_rating, prof.country_code, prof.vip_level, COALESCE(marg.risk_adjusted_collateral, 0.0) AS final_risk_adjusted_collateral, COALESCE(marg.borrowed_amount, 0.0) AS final_total_borrowed, COALESCE(draw.combined_net_pnl, 0.0) AS total_account_combined_pnl, COALESCE(draw.absolute_pnl_drawdown, 0.0) AS total_account_max_drawdown, COALESCE(audit.gross_transaction_count, 0) AS total_gross_transactions, COALESCE(audit.aggregated_fees_paid, 0.0) AS total_commissions_spent, COALESCE(audit.account_activity_classification, 'UNKNOWN') AS activity_classification, COALESCE(audit.execution_health_metric, 'UNKNOWN') AS execution_health, CASE WHEN marg.borrowed_amount > 0 THEN (marg.risk_adjusted_collateral / marg.borrowed_amount) * 100.0 ELSE 999.99 END AS calculated_margin_health_ratio FROM cte_account_profiles_and_tiers prof LEFT JOIN ( SELECT account_id, SUM(risk_adjusted_collateral) AS risk_adjusted_collateral, SUM(borrowed_amount) AS borrowed_amount FROM cte_margin_utilization_snapshot GROUP BY account_id ) marg ON prof.account_id = marg.account_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT account_id, SUM(combined_net_pnl) AS combined_net_pnl, MIN(absolute_pnl_drawdown) AS absolute_pnl_drawdown FROM cte_rolling_drawdown_metrics GROUP BY account_id ) draw ON prof.account_id = draw.account_id LEFT JOIN cte_compliance_and_audit_log audit ON prof.account_id = audit.account_id ) SELECT summary.account_id AS report_account_id, summary.user_id AS report_user_id, summary.account_type AS report_account_type, summary.risk_profile_rating AS report_risk_rating, summary.country_code AS report_jurisdiction, summary.vip_level AS report_vip_tier, summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral AS total_collateral_value, summary.final_total_borrowed AS total_active_debt, summary.total_account_combined_pnl AS performance_pnl, summary.total_account_max_drawdown AS risk_drawdown_depth, summary.total_gross_transactions AS executed_trade_volume, summary.total_commissions_spent AS platform_fees_collected, summary.activity_classification AS trader_archetype, summary.execution_health AS slippage_status, summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio AS health_index, CASE WHEN summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio < 120.0 THEN 'IMMINENT_LIQUIDATION_RISK' WHEN summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio < 150.0 THEN 'MARGIN_CALL_WARNING' WHEN summary.total_account_max_drawdown < -50000.0 THEN 'RISK_EXPOSURE_BREACH' ELSE 'PORTFOLIO_HEALTHY' END AS automated_risk_action_flag, COUNT(summary.account_id) OVER () AS total_monitored_accounts_count, SUM(summary.total_account_combined_pnl) OVER () AS network_total_combined_pnl, AVG(summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio) OVER () AS network_average_health_index, MAX(summary.total_account_max_drawdown) OVER () AS network_extreme_drawdown_value, MIN(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral) OVER () AS network_minimum_collateral_depth, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS telemetry_generation_timestamp, #{executionCorrelationId} AS diagnostic_trace_id, CASE WHEN summary.country_code IN ('US', 'CA') THEN 'SEC_CFTC_JURISDICTION' WHEN summary.country_code IN ('GB', 'DE', 'FR') THEN 'ESMA_MIFID_JURISDICTION' WHEN summary.country_code IN ('SG', 'HK', 'JP') THEN 'APAC_MAS_JURISDICTION' ELSE 'GLOBAL_OFFSHORE_REGULATORY' END AS compliance_regulatory_umbrella, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sub_ord.asset_id) FROM trade_orders sub_ord WHERE sub_ord.account_id = summary.account_id) AS distinct_assets_traded_count, (SELECT SUM(sub_bal.locked_escrow) FROM account_balances sub_bal WHERE sub_bal.account_id = summary.account_id) AS aggregate_locked_escrow_capital, (summary.total_account_combined_pnl / NULLIF(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral, 0.0)) * 100.0 AS localized_return_on_collateral_percentage, ABS(summary.total_account_max_drawdown) / NULLIF(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral, 0.0) AS drawdown_to_collateral_risk_coefficient, CASE WHEN summary.account_type = 'INSTITUTIONAL' AND summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral > 10000000 THEN 'VIP_CORP_GRADE' WHEN summary.account_type = 'RETAIL' AND summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral > 500000 THEN 'HIGH_NET_WORTH_RETAIL' ELSE 'STANDARD_RETAIL_GRADE' END AS internal_client_valuation_tier, (summary.total_commissions_spent / NULLIF(summary.total_account_combined_pnl, 0.0)) AS fee_to_alpha_erosion_ratio, SQRT(ABS(summary.total_account_combined_pnl)) AS structural_variance_proxy, EXP(LN(NULLIF(ABS(summary.total_account_combined_pnl), 0.0))) AS log_scale_pnl_magnitude, CAST(summary.total_gross_transactions AS NUMERIC) / EXTRACT(DAY FROM (#{systemEndTime} - #{systemStartTime})) AS average_trades_per_day_frequency, CASE WHEN summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio > 500.0 THEN 0.0 WHEN summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio > 200.0 THEN (500.0 - summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio) * 0.1 ELSE (200.0 - summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio) * 0.5 + 30.0 END AS composite_risk_liquidation_score, (summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral - summary.final_total_borrowed) + summary.total_account_combined_pnl AS liquid_net_asset_value, CASE WHEN summary.vip_level = 'TIER_5' THEN 'PLATINUM_SUPPORT' WHEN summary.vip_level = 'TIER_4' THEN 'GOLD_SUPPORT' ELSE 'STANDARD_TICKET_QUEUE' END AS operation_routing_priority, MOD(CAST(summary.account_id AS INT), 10) AS sharding_database_node_routing_key, (summary.final_total_borrowed / NULLIF(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral + 1.0, 0.0)) AS leverage_multiplier_ratio, CASE WHEN (summary.final_total_borrowed / NULLIF(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral + 1.0, 0.0)) > 5.0 THEN 'HIGH_LEVERAGE_DANGER' WHEN (summary.final_total_borrowed / NULLIF(summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral + 1.0, 0.0)) > 2.0 THEN 'MODERATE_LEVERAGE_WARNING' ELSE 'CONSERVATIVE_LEVERAGE_SAFE' END AS leverage_risk_classification, COALESCE(summary.total_account_combined_pnl, 0.0) - COALESCE(summary.total_commissions_spent, 0.0) AS net_pnl_after_all_fees, (SELECT MAX(hist.change_timestamp) FROM account_history_logs hist WHERE hist.account_id = summary.account_id) AS last_account_activity_timestamp, (SELECT COUNT(err.log_id) FROM system_error_logs err WHERE err.impacted_account_id = summary.account_id AND err.severity = 'CRITICAL') AS custom_error_incident_count, CASE WHEN summary.risk_profile_rating >= 8 AND summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio < 150.0 THEN 'IMMEDIATE_STOP_OUT_ENABLE' WHEN summary.risk_profile_rating >= 5 AND summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio < 135.0 THEN 'CONDITIONAL_STOP_OUT_ENABLE' ELSE 'MANUAL_SUPERVISION_REQUIRED' END AS risk_desk_execution_protocol, (summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral * 0.02) AS estimated_overnight_funding_yield, (summary.final_total_borrowed * 0.05) AS estimated_overnight_borrow_interest_cost, (summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral * 0.02) - (summary.final_total_borrowed * 0.05) AS projected_net_daily_carry_cost, CASE WHEN ((summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral * 0.02) - (summary.final_total_borrowed * 0.05)) > 0.0 THEN 'POSITIVE_CARRY_ACCOUNT' ELSE 'NEGATIVE_CARRY_ACCOUNT' END AS asset_liability_carry_classification, HASH(summary.account_id || summary.total_account_combined_pnl) AS row_integrity_verification_checksum FROM cte_consolidated_summary_matrix summary WHERE summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio <= #{maxHealthRatioFilter} OR summary.total_account_max_drawdown <= #{minDrawdownDepthFilter} GROUP BY summary.account_id, summary.user_id, summary.account_type, summary.risk_profile_rating, summary.country_code, summary.vip_level, summary.final_risk_adjusted_collateral, summary.final_total_borrowed, summary.total_account_combined_pnl, summary.total_account_max_drawdown, summary.total_gross_transactions, summary.total_commissions_spent, summary.activity_classification, summary.execution_health, summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio HAVING COUNT(summary.account_id) >= 0 ORDER BY summary.calculated_margin_health_ratio ASC, summary.total_account_max_drawdown DESC, summary.total_account_combined_pnl ASC LIMIT #{maxQueryFetchRowsLimit} OFFSET #{queryPaginationOffsetRows}
